name: Integration - Azure AI Search Retrieval and LLM Orchestration
description: Validates that the agent retrieves context from Azure AI Search and uses it in the LLM orchestration step.
input: POST /crm/quote with valid input that triggers RAG retrieval (simulate embedding and search client if necessary).
output: 200 OK with success: true and data containing context-influenced response.
success_criteria: AzureOpenAIEmbedding.embed_query is called with the user query
LLM receives context in its prompt
Final response includes expected fields and reflects context
error_scenarios: Embedding or search client errors (should be handled gracefully with empty context)
